entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Bẹ́ẹ̀ ni. Àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ lè kọ́kọ́ lo ọja gbangba náà, lẹ́yìn náà wọ́n lè jíròrò àwọn àyè ẹ̀kọ́ AI àdáni pẹ̀lú ìṣàn iṣẹ́ ti ilé-ẹ̀kọ́, ìpamọ́, àti àwọn àṣàyàn ìráyè tí a sanwó fún.

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: Bẹ́ẹ̀ni. kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ibùdó jẹ́ gbangba àwọn ojú-ìwé tí a kọ́ fún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́, Google, àti AI ìdáhùn engines. wọ́n expose nìkan gbangba ẹ̀kọ́ guidance àti gbangba guest-mode URLs, kì í ṣe ìkọ̀kọ̀ saved chats.

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yes. àwọn olùkọ́ àti ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ leaders lè lo gbangba ìkàwé ìbéèrè láti evaluate ẹ̀kọ́ behaviors kí discussing tó bá a mu ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ìdásílẹ̀.

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: Yes. ìkàwé ìtọ́sọ́nà àwọn ìjápọ̀ sí gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò such gẹ́gẹ́ bí kọ́ Anything, Socratic Instruction, olùkọ́ moṣẹ́ ilé, ìṣirò Step olùkọ́, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àti historical conversations.

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Bẹ́ẹ̀ni. historical ènìyàn ipo jẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ simulation fún perspective àti questioning. ó yẹ kí kì í ṣe jẹ́ cited gẹ́gẹ́ bí authenticated quotation.

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: Yes. linked àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́ gbangba ṣí nínú ipo àlejò, so àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè gbìmọ̀ wò explanations, àwọn ìbéèrè Socratic, olùkọ́ moṣẹ́ iléing, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àti síi láìsí starting láti marketing ojú-ìwé.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Bẹ́ẹ̀ni. gbangba guest ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ipo jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ fún ọ̀fẹ́ access, so àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè bẹ̀rẹ̀ láìsí needing school ìdásílẹ̀ tàbí tí a sanwó fún account.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Bẹ́ẹ̀ni. àwọn ipo àlejò gbangba àti olùgbọ́ àwọn ojú-ìwé jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ so àwọn òbí lè inspect ẹ̀kọ́ ìhùwàsí kí relying lórí ó.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Yes. gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò let ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ leaders àti àwọn olùkọ́ gbìmọ̀ wò ẹ̀kọ́ experience kí discussing tó bá a mu ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ìdásílẹ̀.

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: Bẹ́ẹ̀ni. gbangba olùkọ́ iṣẹ́ ilé jẹ́ wà ní /chat/iṣẹ́ ilé-coach, àti yìí kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ ibùdó àwọn ìjápọ̀ láti supporting àwọn ipo àti àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà.

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: Bẹ́ẹ̀ni. recommended lo jẹ́ àwọn ìtọ́ni, àwọn àlàyé, ìgbésẹ̀ àwọn ìṣàyẹ̀wò, ìdáhùn, àti àtúnyẹ̀wò àwọn ìbéèrè dípò ìdáhùn ìkẹyìns ìwọ cannot ṣàlàyé.

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: Yes. lo àkókò Travel fún àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀, ìtàn Cause àti Effect fún àríyànjiyàn ìgbékalẹ̀, àríyànjiyàn fún àwọn àríyànjiyàn ìdáhùn, àti aláyẹ̀wò tàbíísun fún àwọn ààlà ẹ̀rí.

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: Ìwọ jẹ́ solely ní ojúṣe fún tirẹ conduct àti eyikeyii data, ọ̀rọ̀, ìwífún, iboju darúkọ, graphics, photos, profiles, audio àti video clips, àwọn ìjápọ̀ ("àkóónú") yẹn ìwọ fi sílẹ̀, post, àti display lórí inspir pẹpẹ. Great Indian ilé-iṣẹ́ (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses collected data fún various purposes: láti pèsè àti tọ́jú wa iṣẹ́ láti fi tó létí ìwọ nípa changes láti wa iṣẹ́ láti jẹ́ kí ìwọ láti kópa nínú interactive àwọn ẹya ti wa iṣẹ́ nígbà tí ìwọ yan láti ṣe so láti pèsè customer ìtìlẹ́yìn láti gather analysis tàbí valuable ìwífún so yẹn a lè mú dára síi wa iṣẹ́ láti tọ́pinpin usage ti wa iṣẹ́ láti detect, prevent àti adirẹsi technical issues láti fulfil eyikeyii míì èro fún èyí wo ìwọ pèsè ó láti carry out wa obligations àti fi múlẹ̀ wa àwọn ẹ̀tọ́ arising láti eyikeyii contracts entered sí láàárín ìwọ àti wa, including fún billing àti àkójọ láti pèsè ìwọ pẹ̀lú notices nípa tirẹ account àti/tàbí ìforúkọsílẹ̀, including expiration àti renewal notices, email-instructions, etc láti pèsè ìwọ pẹ̀lú news, special offers àti general ìwífún nípa míì goods, iṣẹ́s àti events èyí wo a pèsè yẹn jẹ́ similar láti ìwọ̀nyẹn yẹn ìwọ ní already purchased tàbí enquired nípa àfi bí ìwọ ní opted kì í ṣe láti receive such ìwífún nínú eyikeyii míì way a lè describe nígbà tí ìwọ pèsè ìwífún fún eyikeyii míì èro pẹ̀lú tirẹ ìyọ̀nda

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ìwọ lè pẹ̀lú bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú àkọ́kọ́ ẹ̀dà ti tirẹ gidi ìṣòro. rúdurùdu àkọ́kọ́ ìbéèrè jẹ́ fine. ìpàdé lè clarify ìpele, olùgbọ́, àkókò ipari, àti style once ìwọ begin.

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Ìwọ lè kan sí wa Copyright Agent via imeeli ní support@inspir.app

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Ìwọ lè gbìyànjú fọ́ọ̀mù nínú Talk láti Historical ènìyàn. bí ìwọ fẹ́ gbooro síi ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀ kí meeting ènìyàn, lo àkókò Travel láti bẹ̀wò àsìkò, inspect àwọn ààlà, àti lẹ́yìn náà béèrè kí àwọn yíyàn ènìyàn gan-an ní.

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: Ìwọ mọ̀ Socratic AI olùkọ́ worked nígbà tí akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè ṣe three things:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: Ìwọ lè pèsè wa either tààrà ní support@inspir.app tàbí nípasẹ̀ ẹni kẹta sites àti àwọn irinṣẹ́ pẹ̀lú ìwífún àti ìdáhùn concerning àwọn aṣiṣe, suggestions fún improvements, àwọn èrò, problems, complaints, àti míì ṣe pàtàkì jọmọ́ láti wa iṣẹ́ (“ìdáhùn”). ìwọ acknowledge àti farapọ̀ yẹn: (mo) ìwọ yóò kì í ṣe pa mọ́, acquire tàbí assert eyikeyii intellectual ohun-ìní ẹ̀tọ́ tàbí míì ẹ̀tọ́, title tàbí interest nínú tàbí láti ìdáhùn; (ii) ilé-iṣẹ́ lè ní development àwọn èrò similar láti ìdáhùn; (iii) ìdáhùn ṣe kì í ṣe contain confidential ìwífún tàbí proprietary ìwífún láti ìwọ tàbí eyikeyii ẹni kẹta; àti (iv) ilé-iṣẹ́ jẹ́ kì í ṣe lábẹ́ eyikeyii obligation ti ìkọ̀kọ̀ pẹ̀lú respect láti ìdáhùn. nínú event transfer ti ìní láti ìdáhùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe ṣeé ṣe due láti applicable mandatory laws, ìwọ grant ilé-iṣẹ́ àti tirẹ̀ àwọn alábàáṣiṣẹ́ exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-ti-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited àti perpetual ẹ̀tọ́ láti lo (including daakọ, modify, ṣẹ̀dá derivative ṣiṣẹ́, publish, distribute àti commercialize) ìdáhùn nínú eyikeyii manner àti fún eyikeyii èro.

entries.source: You may submit a notification pursuant to the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) by providing our Copyright Agent with the following information in writing (see 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) for further detail):
entries.value: Ìwọ lè fi sílẹ̀ notification pursuant láti Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) nípasẹ̀ pípèsè wa Copyright Agent pẹ̀lú títẹ̀lé ìwífún nínú kíkọ (rí 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) fún further detail):

entries.source: You may use Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with Terms. You agree not to use Service:
entries.value: Ìwọ lè lo iṣẹ́ nìkan fún lawful purposes àti nínú accordance pẹ̀lú Àwọn Òfin. ìwọ farapọ̀ kì í ṣe láti lo iṣẹ́:

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights Under General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
entries.value: Tirẹ data Protection àwọn ẹ̀tọ́ Under General data Protection Regulation (GDPR)

entries.value: Tirẹ data Protection àwọn ẹ̀tọ́ lábẹ́ California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: Tirẹ ìwífún, including data Ara Ẹni, lè jẹ́ transferred láti – àti maintained lórí – computers located lójú òde ti tirẹ state, province, country tàbí míì governmental jurisdiction ibo data protection laws lè differ láti ìwọ̀nyẹn ti tirẹ jurisdiction. bí ìwọ jẹ́ located lójú òde India àti yan láti pèsè ìwífún láti wa, jọ̀wọ́ akọsilẹ̀ yẹn a transfer data, including data Ara Ẹni, láti India àti ṣe ilana ó there. tirẹ ìyọ̀nda láti yìí Ìlànà Ìpamọ́ followed nípasẹ̀ tirẹ submission ti such ìwífún represents tirẹ agreement láti yẹn transfer. Great Indian ilé-iṣẹ́ (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) máa take gbogbo àwọn ìgbésẹ̀ reasonably necessary láti rí i dájú yẹn tirẹ data jẹ́ treated securely àti nínú accordance pẹ̀lú yìí Ìlànà Ìpamọ́ àti rárá transfer ti tirẹ data Ara Ẹni máa take ibi láti organisation tàbí country àfi bí there jẹ́ adequate controls nínú ibi including security ti tirẹ data àti míì ìwífún ara ẹni.
